result.stdout:
dotnet-linux-cert
  Dotnet linux cert helper: Install and list PKCS#12 certificates for *nix system

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-cert [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install       Install certificates, optionally with password supplied
  auto-install  Auto install certificates (with .txt pairs) from path specified
  list          List certificates, can be filtered by store name or location

commands.payload:
dotnet-linux-cert
  Dotnet linux cert helper: Install and list PKCS#12 certificates for *nix system

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-cert [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install       Install certificates, optionally with password supplied
  auto-install  Auto install certificates (with .txt pairs) from path specified
  list          List certificates, can be filtered by store name or location

result.stdout:
auto-install
  Auto install certificates (with .txt pairs) from path specified

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-cert [options] auto-install

Options:
  -f, --path <path>                      Path of the directory [default: /Certificates]
  -n, --store-name <store-name>          Specify store name, available value: [AddressBook AuthRoot CertificateAuthority Disallowed My Root TrustedPeople TrustedPublisher] [default: My]
  -l, --store-location <store-location>  Specify store location, available value: [CurrentUser LocalMachine] [default: CurrentUser]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

auto-install

Usage:

Options:

  -n, --store-name <store-name>          Specify store name, available value: [AddressBook AuthRoot CertificateAuthority Disallowed My Root TrustedPeople TrustedPublisher] [default: My]
  -l, --store-location <store-location>  Specify store location, available value: [CurrentUser LocalMachine] [default: CurrentUser]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
install
  Install certificates, optionally with password supplied

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-cert [options] install

Options:
  -f, --path <path> (REQUIRED)           Path of the certificate
  -p, --password <password>              Password of the certificate
  -n, --store-name <store-name>          Specify store name, available value: [AddressBook AuthRoot CertificateAuthority Disallowed My Root TrustedPeople TrustedPublisher] [default: My]
  -l, --store-location <store-location>  Specify store location, available value: [CurrentUser LocalMachine] [default: CurrentUser]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
